Brief description of the changes.

## Why

Motivation and context. Link to issue if applicable: Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Contract change (requires deploy)
- [ ] Config/environment change

## Testing

- [ ] `forge test` passes (if contracts changed)
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes in `packages/client` (if client changed)
- [ ] Tested on beta environment
- [ ] Tested with embedded wallet (Google auth)
- [ ] Tested with MetaMask

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] No secrets or private keys committed
- [ ] On-chain constants match documentation
- [ ] Access control reviewed (new systems have proper namespace permissions)
- [ ] `PauseLib.requireNotPaused()` added to new player-facing entry points
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No unrelated changes bundled
